description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style coupe car with a glossy red exterior and a classic, boxy silhouette. The car features four doors, each with visible handles, and black trim around the windows and wheel arches. The front end is characterized by rounded headlights and a simple, blacked-out grille, while the rear displays small, rounded taillights and a subtle trunk. The windows are dark and opaque, suggesting a stylized or simplified interior. The wheels are small with whitewall tires, adding to the retro aesthetic. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century European sedans, with smooth, curved surfaces and minimal ornamentation.
description: A compact, vintage red coupe car with four doors, rounded headlights, and a classic boxy silhouette. It features black trim, whitewall tires, and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the rounded headlights, black grille, and two left-side doors with visible handles.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the small, rounded taillights, trunk, and left-side doors.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the trunk, right-side doors, and rear bumper details.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the headlights, grille, and two right-side doors.
attribute_window_configuration: four-door coupe with two side windows per side
